name: David O'Doherty
bio: David O Doherty is an Irish comedian, author and musician known for low-key, whimsical stand-up performed with songs played on a small battery-powered keyboard. He won the if.comedy award at the Edinburgh Fringe in 2008 and Best International Comedian at the 2014 Sydney Comedy Festival. He has toured worldwide and written several childrens books.

timeline.ev: Makes his first stage appearance at Dublins Comedy Cellar
Nominated for an if.comedy award for David O Doherty Is My Name
Wins the if.comedy award at the Edinburgh Fringe for Lets Comedy
Becomes the first Irish comedian with his own Comedy Central Presents episode
Wins Best International Comedian at the Sydney Comedy Festival
Co-hosts the podcast What Did You Do Yesterday with Max Rushden

accolades: if.comedy award winner for Lets Comedy (2008)
Best International Comedian, Sydney Comedy Festival (2014)
First Irish comedian with a Comedy Central Presents episode (2012)
